title: Implement tenant step 1 save (preferred_locations)
description: On the Next button of tenant onboarding step 1, persist preferred_locations to sessionStorage and navigate to step 2.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking Next saves the tags array to sessionStorage key 'onboarding_locations'
If tags array is empty, Next button remains disabled
technical_notes: Location data is saved to Supabase in TASK-033 rather than step-by-step, to avoid partial writes that could leave the preferences table in an incomplete state.
